subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the All-Glorious Beauty! Thy various writings which thou didst address to Áqá Siyyid Taqí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی تحاریر متعدده آنجناب که باقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrdom of the Bab, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
